titles.title: I Am Ready For The Stepping Across

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Have you caught a glimpse of the joy over yonder? Have you seen the reality of where we are? I have caught a glimpse, I've seen signs of the resurrection, And I see and believe our catching away can't be far. I have expected to see the resurrected, Come walking through someone's door, Maybe mine, maybe yours, it is here.

verse.name: v2
v3
v4
verse.lines: Do you feel what I'm feeling, can you see what I'm seeing, Do you know why I'm singing, I can't help but rejoicing, I am ready for the stepping across. I am ready for the stepping across.
